declarer.note: 3H goes down (8 DD tricks); cannot make.

defense.note: E on lead helps defeat 3H; defense matters but bidding is the lesson.

bidding.note: South doubles 1S with 13 HCP, doubleton spade, support for the others; down_both caps it and partner's leap to 3NT overreaches without a solid source of tricks.

declarer.note: 3NT goes down (7 DD tricks); cannot make.

defense.note: E on lead helps defeat 3NT; defense matters but bidding is the lesson.

bidding.note: South doubles 1D with 12 HCP, doubleton diamond, 4-4 majors plus clubs; partner passes for penalties and 1D doubled collapses — sound takeout double with a happy penalty result.

declarer.note: E plays 1D doubled down five (3 DD tricks); E-W disaster, off-discipline for declarer play.

defense.note: S on lead beats E-W's 1D doubled badly; clean defensive cash-out but the bidding/penalty is the real lesson.
